p.font:
🟢 Operational Platform Workflow
Order processing, fulfilment execution, operational event publishing, and platform-generated logging activities.

🔵 Operational Data & Messaging Flow
Database transactions, task instructions, inventory updates, messaging, and system-to-system communications.

🟡 Reporting, Analytics & Resilience
Reporting services, operational analytics, high availability (HA) configuration, and resilience mechanisms.

🔴 Support Investigation & Operational Response
Troubleshooting, incident investigation, root cause analysis, operational support activities, and recovery actions.

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));
